TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit ToolChoiceParam extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.AI.Projects.ToolChoiceParam>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.AI.Projects.ToolChoiceParam>
Public MustInherit Class ToolChoiceParam Implements IJsonModel(Of ToolChoiceParam), IPersistableModel(Of ToolChoiceParam)
type ToolChoiceParam = class interface IJsonModel<ToolChoiceParam> interface IPersistableModel<ToolChoiceParam>

Docs.summary: How the model should select which tool (or tools) to use when generating a response. See the `tools` parameter to see how to specify which tools the model can call. Please note this is the abstract base class. The derived classes available for instantiation are: , , , , , , , , , , , and .
